description:
The design was finalized-then-reopened three times (bl-62bc -> bl-0601 -> config/store split). bl-2e26's body is now an ~85KB working ball that its own §8 says should move to docs/ 'once the design stops churning.' It has churned and held under attack — freeze it. This should have happened BEFORE implementation started; doing it now as catch-up.

SCOPE:
- Extract bl-2e26's description into an authoritative doc under docs/ (e.g. docs/architecture.md, or split by §). Keep the §15 revision log + the why.
- Make docs/ the source of truth implementation builds against — a frozen reference, not a moving ball.
- Then close bl-2e26 (closing ARCHIVES it — fine once docs/ holds the content; the worktree recovery recipe is in the config/store-split memory if needed again).

ORDERING: SHOULD PRECEDE further correction implementation (bl-f970 and the rest) so the build targets a frozen reference. Not hard-wired as a dep on those tasks — wire it if you want a gate, or just land this first by priority.
title: Freeze the greenfield design: migrate bl-2e26 spec -> docs/, close the working ball
